mapper.select: SELECT i.inquiry_id, i.inquiry_user_id, u.user_name, i.inquiry_cat_id, c.cat_id, c.cat_name, i.inquiry_title, i.inquiry_content, i.inquiry_created_date, i.inquiry_answer_date, i.inquiry_status, i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i JOIN movmov_users u ON u.user_id = i.inquiry_user_id JOIN movmov_content_categories c ON c.cat_id = i.inquiry_cat_id

SELECT i.inquiry_id, i.inquiry_user_id, u.user_name, i.inquiry_cat_id, c.cat_id, c.cat_name, i.inquiry_title, i.inquiry_content, i.inquiry_created_date, i.inquiry_answer_date, i.inquiry_status, i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i JOIN movmov_users u ON u.user_id = i.inquiry_user_id JOIN movmov_content_categories c ON c.cat_id = i.inquiry_cat_id WHERE i.inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}

SELECT i.inquiry_id, i.inquiry_user_id, u.user_name, i.inquiry_cat_id, c.cat_id, c.cat_name, i.inquiry_title, i.inquiry_content, i.inquiry_created_date, i.inquiry_answer_date, i.inquiry_status, i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i JOIN movmov_users u ON u.user_id = i.inquiry_user_id JOIN movmov_content_categories c ON c.cat_id = i.inquiry_cat_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
